news.title: 🇫🇷 telegram founder pavel durov: france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron "is losing legitima
news.summary:
🇫🇷 telegram founder pavel durov: france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron "is losing legitimacy"

elon musk has been summoned again for questioning by the paris prosecutor's office in connection with allegations of distributing illegal sexualized images.

according to the times, the questioning is considered "voluntary," and the prosecutor's office has also summoned linda yaccarino, the former ceo of x, the social media platform owned by musk.

this procedure was initiated as part of a case opened earlier last year regarding the distribution of illegal sexualized images and deepfakes on the social media platform. the allegations are based on the premise that grok may be capable of generating sexualized images.

the authorities have not specified whETHer musk will face penalties if he fails to appear for questioning, but they noted that his absence will not halt the investigation.

according to the newspaper, other employees of x are expected to be summoned for questioning this week.

meanwhile, pavel durov, against whom french authorities have also brought several charges, stated that france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron, "is losing legitimacy because it is using criminal investigations to suppress freedom of speech and privacy."

news.title:
vitalik: l2s that only copy 이더리움 make no sense

이더리움 founder vitalik buterin @vitalikbuterin stated
news.summary:
vitalik: l2s that only copy 이더리움 make no sense

이더리움 founder vitalik buterin @vitalikbuterin stated during his speech at the 4th hong kong web3 festival on april 20 that an l2 that merely clones 이더리움 and makes it more centralized is meaningless. a truly meaningful l2 should examine application needs and build the required off-chain components outside of 이더리움 l1. 

furthermore, vitalik noted that future scaling remains a key focus: first, data scaling, which requires further advancing the peerdas technology introduced in a previous hard fork; second, compute scaling, which allows different applications to compose and communicate with each other without the need for any intermediaries.

video

news.title: llamarisk, an aave dao risk service provider, released its rsETH incident report, quantifying the po
news.summary:
llamarisk, an aave dao risk service provider, released its rsETH incident report, quantifying the potential bad debt impact on aave under two scenarios:

1. uniform loss socialization across all rsETH

~15.12% haircut, resulting in approximately $123.7 million in bad debt, with the largest abSOLute loss on 이더리움 core and the highest proportional shortfall on mantle.

2. losses iSOLated to l2 rsETH

~73.54% haircut, resulting in approximately $230.1 million in bad debt, concentrated on l2s. mantle would face a 71.45% wETH shortfall and 아비트럼 a 26.67% shortfall, while 이더리움 core would remain unaffected.

the report also notes that wETH reserves across chains are at 100% utilization with under $20 of idle liquidity, limiting liquidation capacity and potentially amplifying risk. it recommends pausing the wETH umbrella module, with bad debt to be addressed jointly by the aave dao treasury and ecosystem participants.

nitter.net/aave/status/2046321565…

news.title:
디파이 losses exceed $600 million in three weeks as tvl falls 25% to $82.4 billion

recent security inc
news.summary:
디파이 losses exceed $600 million in three weeks as tvl falls 25% to $82.4 billion

recent security incidents have pushed 디파이 losses above $600 million over the past three weeks, with the $292 million kelp dao bridge exploit accelerating the downturn. total value locked (tvl) has fallen to around $82.4 billion, down about 25% from roughly $110 billion at the start of 2026, alongside a 5.6% single-day drawdown. lending markets have been hit the hardest, with tvl declining about 13%.

news.title: source: theblock.co/post/398154/디파이…
news.summary: source: theblock.co/post/398154/디파이…

news.title:
vitalik buterin: 이더리움 must withstand the day all core developers leave

speaking at the 4th hong kon
news.summary:
vitalik buterin: 이더리움 must withstand the day all core developers leave

speaking at the 4th hong kong web3 festival on april 20, 2026, vitalik buterin @vitalikbuterin stated that 이더리움's goal is not to be the fastest chain or compete with high-frequency trading platforms, but to serve as a secure, decentralized, and reliable network. 

to support long-term digital assets, he noted that 이더리움 is advancing formal verification through ai and pursuing quantum resistance. ultimately, 이더리움 strives to pass the "walkaway test" similar to 비트코인, ensuring the network can function stably as a long-term foundation even without the ongoing involvement of core developers.

video

news.title: source: piped.video/live/acjs9fd6dtu…
news.summary: source: piped.video/live/acjs9fd6dtu…

news.title: sonic research states that most pos 블록체인s rely on elliptic-curve signatures and aggregation schemes
news.summary: sonic research states that most pos 블록체인s rely on elliptic-curve signatures and aggregation schemes that are vulnerable to quantum attacks and difficult to replace without significant protocol changes and performance trade-offs, while soniccs, which relies only on per-event signatures and hash functions, can transition to post-quantum security by replacing its signature scheme without altering its core consensus design.

news.title: source: blog.soniclabs.com/sonics-ro…
news.summary: source: blog.soniclabs.com/sonics-ro…

news.title:
코인base, bybit explore bringing u.s. stocks on-chain

코인base is in discussions with bybit to explore
news.summary:
코인base, bybit explore bringing u.s. stocks on-chain

코인base is in discussions with bybit to explore 토큰ization, custody, and global distribution of assets including u.s. public and pre-ipo stocks.

the talks do not involve any equity investment or bybit’s u.s. market entry, sources said. bybit’s u.s. expansion is expected to proceed via a separate entity led by former co-ceo helen liu with a local partner providing licensing and compliance. both 코인base and bybit declined to comment. 

previously, wu 블록체인 exclusively reported that 코인base and bybit were in talks regarding an investment cooperation agreement, through which bybit aims to enter the u.s. regulated market.

news.title:
🇩🇪 germany’s economic motor shifts from global car giant to europe’s military industrial hub

german
news.summary:
🇩🇪 germany’s economic motor shifts from global car giant to europe’s military industrial hub

germany is experiencing its longest period of stagnation since world war ii. the manufacturing sector is reportedly losing around 15,000 jobs per month, while major carmakers such as volkswagen and mercedes-benz have seen profit declines of over 40%.

in response, berlin has committed more than $500 billion (€460 billion) in defense spending over the next decade, with annual military expenditure projected to reach around $190 billion by 2029.

several industrial conversions are already underway:

- rheinmetall is repurposing former auto-parts facilities in berlin and neuss for military production.

- volkswagen is reportedly discussing converting its osnabrück plant to produce defense-related components, including transport vehicles and missile systems.

- knds has acquired a former alstom rail factory in görlitz to produce components for leopard 2 tanks and puma infantry fighting vehicles.

defense companies such as henSOLdt are also recruiting engineers and technicians from automotive suppliers like continental and bosch.

the german defense industry association has nearly doubled its membership in a year, as civilian suppliers shift toward military contracts. some firms, such as schaeffler, are also expanding production into drones.

analysts estimate that raising defense spending to 3% of GDP could generate tens of billions in annual output and create up to 245,000 jobs.

📰: wsj

news.title: 🇮🇷🇸🇦🇦🇪 iran is reportedly planning a single coordinated strike that could wipe out 32% of global oil
news.summary:
🇮🇷🇸🇦🇦🇪 iran is reportedly planning a single coordinated strike that could wipe out 32% of global oil supply.

the targets, according to tasnim news agency:
- yanbu pipeline in saudi arabia
- fujairah oil facility in the uae
- full houthi closure of the bab el-mandeb strait

if even half of this plays out alongside a hormuz blockade, the global energy market won’t adjust gradually and may collapse all at once.

bab el-mandeb alone handles roughly 6 million barrels a day.
fujairah is one of the world's largest bunkering hubs.
yanbu is the artery connecting saudi oil fields to the red sea.

hit all three simultaneously and you're looking at a structural rupture that would take months to stabilize, if it stabilizes at all.

source: tasnim news agency




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇺🇸🇮🇷 the u.s. navy boarded and seized an iranian-flagged vessel in the arabian sea yestarday. 

the m/v touska tried to run the blockade. it didn't get through.

this is now a daily pattern. iran probes. the u.s. intercepts. neither side is backing down.

the blockade is a pressure valve.

every ship iran loses is a message to tehran that the economic squeeze is real and enforceable at sea.

source: centcom

video

news.title:
🚨🇨🇳 tungsten just spiked 640% in a year. almost nobody is talking about it...

the metal is used in
news.summary:
🚨🇨🇳 tungsten just spiked 640% in a year. almost nobody is talking about it...

the metal is used in armor-piercing tank rounds, bunker busters, artillery shells, and the warheads of every tomahawk cruise missile currently being fired in the middle east. 

highest melting point of any known element. 

nearly twice as dense as lead. 

it is the backbone of modern kinetic warfare.

china controls 83 to 85% of global supply and nearly all the processing.

the chart shows the smoking gun...

rotterdam prices are exploding while chinese domestic prices stayed flat. 

that's beijing deliberately choking off exports to the west while keeping the same metal cheap for its own defense industry.

the u.s. and nato burned through stockpiles supplying ukraine.

now they're burning through more sustaining the iran war.

congress can appropriate whatever it wants for munitions.

defense contractors physically cannot build the shells without tungsten.

everyone is watching the navy blockade iran.

china is running a quieter more devastating blockade on the metals that make every weapon the west fires.

source: bloomberg



video
  




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

news.title:
the housing market is running out of buyers:

there were an estimated 46.3% more home sellers than b
news.summary:
the housing market is running out of buyers:

there were an estimated 46.3% more home sellers than buyers in february 2026, the biggest difference since redfin data began in 2013.

this gap has widened sharply from 29.8% a year ago, marking the strongest market for buyers in over a decade.

by comparison, there were a record 36.0% more buyers than sellers in november 2022.

this comes as the number of active homebuyers fell -2.4% mom, to ~1.36 million, the lowest since at least 2013.

at the same time, the number of sellers declined -0.4% mom to ~1.99 million, posting a smaller decrease than homebuyers.

further home price cuts are likely coming.

news.title:
us small businesses are pulling back on investment as if we are in a crisis:

in march, only 16% of
news.summary:
us small businesses are pulling back on investment as if we are in a crisis:

in march, only 16% of small businesses said that they plan on investing in capex over the next 6 months, the lowest reading since november 2009.

this percentage has declined -12 points since november 2024.

by comparison, the pre-2008 financial crisis and the 2020 pandemic levels were 30-35%.

furthermore, the proportion of firms investing in capex over the last 6 months has declined -9 points since january, and remains below the long-term historical average.

this comes as policy uncertainty and elevated energy costs are weighing on small businesses.

all while they cite taxes, quality of labor, and 인플레이션 as their most important problems.

small businesses are struggling in the us.

news.title:
tim cook will step down as ceo of apple in september

he will be succeeded by john ternus, currently
news.summary:
tim cook will step down as ceo of apple in september

he will be succeeded by john ternus, currently senior vice president of hardware engineering.

cook will transition to the role of executive chairman. he was appointed ceo in 2011 following the resignation of steve jobs.

news.summary:
🇲🇽 at least 2 dead and 3 wounded after a shooting in the teotihuacán archaeological zone in mexico

a lone gunman opened fire from atop a major structure, killing one woman of canadian nationality. 

a total of six individuals were injured.

four victims suffered gunshot wounds, including citizens from colombia, russia, and canADA. two additional victims were injured from falls during the ensuing chaos.

the attacker subsequently died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound.

news.title: in tuapse, black “rain” has been reported following a fire at an oil terminal, while authorities cla
news.summary:
in tuapse, black “rain” has been reported following a fire at an oil terminal, while authorities claim air quality remains safe.

a dark residue has covered cars, roads, and buildings after a drone strike on a local refinery. fuel also entered the black sea, where a large oil slick of about 10,000 square meters has been observed.

russian authorities said the fire did not lead to significant air pollution.

many residents have already begun to evacuate the city on their own.
